title: Bibi Doll 10" Realistic Twin Girl Dolls Ella & Emma with Pink Outfits, Feeding Set and Magic Milk Bottle - Soft Vinyl Body - Ideal for Girls and Boys Aged 3 Years and Up
features: BIBI DOLL BABIES ELLA & EMMA: Our twin dolls "Ella & Emma" come dressed in cute pink outfits, featuring furry coats, beanies, socks, and dresses. Our realistic baby dolls bring double the fun and love play time! Our playful twins love to share, from giggles to meals, with their magic milk and feeding set.

BABY DOLL FEEDING SET: Our dolls come with a baby doll feeding set, including a plate, two spoons, and a magic milk baby doll bottle. It is the perfect addition to any baby doll accessories collection, ensuring your child can care for their dolls just like a real parent.

LIFELIKE AND REALISTIC DESIGN: Designed to resemble real babies, our twin dolls are perfect for nurturing play. These lifelike baby doll will inspire hours of imaginative fun, making them ideal baby dolls for girls & boys.

IDEAL GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION: Ideal for birthdays, Christmas, or other special occasions, these realistic baby dolls will capture your child's heart. They are the perfect choice for any child who loves playing with baby dolls for girls & boys.
Specifications: Packaging Dimensions: Height 17cm, Depth 15cm, Width 37cm, Weight 700gm / Item Dimensions: Height 25cm, Depth Width / Brand: BiBi Doll / Material: Vinyl / Minimum Age: 3 Years+
